name: together-onboarding
description: Intern onboarding coach for the Together / Хочу.Вместе codebase — guided, hands-on drills through the backend (Django) and frontend (React mini app), inside your AI agent.

interface.shortDescription: Onboard to the Together codebase: backend & frontend, hands-on.
interface.longDescription: An interactive onboarding coach for new interns on the Together / Хочу.Вместе project (a Telegram Mini App for Astana). Pick a track — backend (Django, the bot, Celery, sourcing, ML) or frontend (the React mini app in mates/) — and work through short, codebase-grounded drills you do in a real checkout, with progress tracking, backed by the RunDrill MCP engine.
defaultPrompt: Start onboarding me to the Together codebase.
Put me on the backend track.
